payload.answer: The article at https://example.com/missing could not be fetched due to a 404 network error. No content was stored.

entity_resolution.reason: No resolvable entity was successfully retrieved; the URL is inaccessible and no content was obtained for disambiguation or canonicalization.

memory_cards.statement: Attempted to fetch article at https://example.com/missing for memory architecture purposes, but received a 404 network error.

details: HTTP 404 Not Found encountered during fetch
Memory card created to log the failure for traceability
No durable memory of article content established

repair_options: Verify the URL for typos or alternative paths
Check if the resource has been moved or archived elsewhere
Attempt fetch again after a delay in case of transient failure
Consult a search engine or archive (e.g., Wayback Machine) for a cached version
Contact the source administrator if the resource is expected to be available
